falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous high from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would invalidate the 'hold' signal by confirming a bullish reversal contrary to the bottom pattern's expectations.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 50 (current score: 39) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would indicate extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current 'hold' signal and suggesting a forced reversal rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-day moving average of Bitcoin trading volume drops below 15 billion USD (20% below 2024-Aug average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume collapse would indicate market participation breakdown, falsifying the pattern's assumption of sustained momentum and invalidating the 'unknown' verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
